'''Fizz''' was a member of the [[Senate Security Committee]], where he had a brilliant career and became an acquaintance of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], meeting the young apprentice, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], through him. After that, he worked as a mechanic on the [[Kronex spaceport]].

Once, during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Fizz helped Kenobi and his apprentice [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] discover the destination of the [[Storm Fleet]] when it temporarily landed in the Kronex spaceport. Fizz knocked-out a guard guarding the vessels and sneaked into one of the ships to obtain this information. He was last heard saying he wanted to sit out the Clone Wars in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and not get involved in any more Jedi operations.
